title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.810 - Extraordinary costs and interconnection charges paid by governing body
text:
260.810.  Extraordinary costs and interconnection charges paid by governing body. — The governing body shall pay to the regulated electrical corporation those extraordinary costs directly applicable to receipt of the electricity.  All charges for interconnection shall be no greater than if the electricity was received from another regulated electrical corporation.
(L. 1986 S.B. 754 § 3)
